The '''Bowane nebula''' was a [[Nebula/Legends|nebula]] that was situated near the [[Isis system]], a [[Star system/Legends|star system]] located in the [[Fand sector/Legends|Fand sector]]<ref name="TIC" /> of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].<ref name="EAOC" />

{{Neb-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
[[Jason Fry]], co-author of ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'', indicated in [[June]] [[2015]] that the Bowane nebula and the Fand sector were excluded from [[Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion|''The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion]] because later sources placed the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Isis/Legends|Isis]] in the [[Anoat sector/Legends|Anoat sector]] of the [[Greater Javin/Legends|Greater Javin]].<ref name="Email">{{EmailCite|email=File:EAOC discussion.jpg|creator=Jason Fry|date=2015-06-30}}</ref>

==Appearances==
*''[[The Isis Coordinates]]'' {{1stm}}
